---
title: "GuideStar Pro"
page-layout: article
---

# GuideStar Pro

## Description

Nonprofit organization database with information on programs, finances, leadership, and IRS filings. Useful for nonprofit, philanthropy, civic sector, and organizational research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

For assistance with downloading lists with more than 1000 results, please contact business.reference@yale.edu.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-guidestar)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
